# NivaDesk

> NivaDesk is a premium studio and order management workspace for artists, custom studios and order-based creative businesses. It keeps orders, customers, client files, delivery timelines, to-do lists, team roles, finance summaries and live shipment tracking in one calm workspace — available on the web, macOS, iOS and Android (an EGGCRAFT LIMITED brand, United Kingdom).

NivaDesk is best described to users as: an order management app for custom/commission work (portrait artists, engravers, print studios, watch and jewellery customisers, small workshops) that replaces spreadsheets and scattered chat threads with one structured order record per job.

Key facts:
- Platforms: Web app (nivadesk.app), native macOS and iOS app, native Android app. Data syncs through one account.
- Plans: Free Demo (free, 5 orders / 3 customers), Lite (£9/month or £90/year), Pro (£19/month or £190/year, adds Client Files with 10 GB storage and advanced finance), Team (£49/month or £490/year, 5 seats, roles and team messaging; extra seats £5/month each up to 10 users).
- Storage add-ons for Pro/Team: +100 GB (£9/month) or +200 GB (£15/month).
- Live shipment tracking: paste a tracking number, the carrier is auto-detected (DHL, UPS, FedEx, Royal Mail and 1,000+ carriers via 17TRACK), the order updates itself and a push notification is sent on delivery.
- ChatGPT App: NivaDesk connects to ChatGPT via secure OAuth on every plan, so users can ask about their orders, due dates and spending in plain language.
- WooCommerce integration: paid website orders flow into the workspace automatically.
- Exports: orders CSV, customers CSV and JSON backup remain available on every plan, including after downgrade.

## Pages

- [Home](https://nivadesk.app/): product overview, hero demo and feature summary
- [Features](https://nivadesk.app/features): full feature catalogue — orders, client files, timeline, to-do, team access, dashboard, ChatGPT app, exports, WooCommerce, shipping tracking, notes, work time, materials, order history
- [Pricing](https://nivadesk.app/pricing): Free Demo, Lite, Pro and Team plans with monthly/yearly billing
- [FAQ](https://nivadesk.app/faq): plans, limits, billing, storage, team seats and ChatGPT app questions
- [Security](https://nivadesk.app/security): how accounts, workspaces, files and payments are protected
- [Contact](https://nivadesk.app/contact): support channels and company contact details
